description: Firm Risk Mandate Monitor - scores the consolidated firm book against hard institutional limits (gross, net band, single-name, sector, top-10, desk cap, diversification, drawdown) and publishes one GREEN/AMBER/RED risk posture to data/risk-monitor.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Risk Mandate Monitor - daily 01:30 UTC via Amazon EventBridge Scheduler, 30 minutes after the Firm Book publishes the consolidated blotter so the mandate is scored on a fresh book.
